title: Portfolio Management Techniques: The expected return of a portfolio composed of 0.7 stock...
summary: Calculate portfolio expected return as the weighted average of component asset returns.
prompt: The expected return of a portfolio composed of 70% stock A (E(r) = 10%) and 30% stock B (E(r) = 15%) is:
solution: The expected return is calculated as E(r) = 0.7(10%) + 0.3(15%) = 13%.
